# Dossier — Configuration

Per-user settings read by the `dossier` skill.

---

## Notion Tracker (Optional)

```yaml
# --- Notion Mirror (optional) ---
notion:
  enabled: true
  data_source_id: "abc12345-6789-0def-1234-567890abcdef"
  parent_page_url: "https://www.notion.so/workspace/Dossier-Tracker-abc1234567890def1234567890abcdef"
  tracker_url: "https://www.notion.so/workspace/abc1234567890def1234567890abcdef"
  sync_compensation: false
```
